name: praxdaily
description: Self-hosted AI daily digest — local web panel that wires Prax's ai-news-daily skill to WeChat. Hermes-equivalent, runs on your laptop.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "try{require('child_process').execFileSync('python3',['--version'],{stdio:'ignore'})}catch{console.log('\nNote: Python 3.10+ is required at runtime. Install from https://www.python.org/downloads/\n')}"

author: Prax Contributors
